_comment: The self-update cadence and its approval history. D8 LOCKED: WEEKLY, PINNED. The recommender (ews_cadence.py) may write a note into the digest, but 'current' NEVER changes itself - only an explicit operator 'ews-entry.sh cadence set ...' writes a new history entry. This file is EWS data: it rides the repo + rollout, never a box-local edit.

current.reason: D8 LOCKED - start weekly and stay weekly; do not auto-downshift to monthly.

recommender.note: Surfaces a recommendation LINE in the weekly digest only. It never mutates 'current'. Hysteresis and the drift-velocity rule live in ews_cadence.py; with pinned=true the recommendation is advisory text, not an action.

drift_velocity_rule.note: Retained for the advisory recommendation only. Because current.pinned=true (D8), a 'monthly' recommendation is shown but never applied by the system.
